user.name: Kirk Borne

fullText:
I have been tracking my own follower count on X for over 11 years, ever since I had 30,000 followers. For the past several years, I have specifically recorded the specific dates when that number crossed past the next 1000, all the way up to 485,000 on March 29 of this year. That was  11 weeks (77 days) ago. My current number (according to my X profile page) is ~485,300 — a mere increase of about 4 per day. X’s own numbers on my Premium Account Analytics page is shown in the chart below — not one day had a net decrease. The average increase per day is around 40-50 (or more) — I can’t tell a specific number from this eye chart. But it is certainly 10X what my profile page says — a real increase of 3000-4000 followers since March, not 300.

I am now hearing from people saying that they “followed” my account but the follow did not register for them. My DAILY X-generated ANALYTICS show it, but my follower count and my new followers don’t see it. 

Other accounts here have been reporting similar problems with their follower counts.

If someone knows a hack to fix this, please post it here, for myself and others. Thanks.

user.name: AIGCLINK
user.description: 致力于让每个想拥抱AI的人都能找到适合自己的AI产品，助力企业定制AIGC应用

fullText:
给Agent的外挂大脑，解决Agent上线后运维与自主优化的一个工具：Adaline 2.0

这是一个面向生产环境的Agent运维与自动优化平台，核心解决Agent上线后的行为监控、问题暴露、自动生成测试与数据、以及自动迭代的问题

当Agent大规模进入生产环境时，这个需求就比较精准

首先链路追踪，Agent每一步推理/工具调用全量记录，并自动归类重复的行为模式，生成行为地图可视化呈现

然后从真实trace中自动生成测试用例，并生成缺失场景的合成数据，自动生成多个候选Agent并自动测试

等于是给Agent外挂一个自我改进层，让Agent运维变成了一个由数据驱动的自动化工程

#agent运维 #Adaline  #AgentOps
